name: Queen of Hearts | Lorina
description:
"O- Okay, That's enough, you can- j- STOP PLAYING HIGH & LOW-!"

///

"Sorry babe, the High & Low grind is endless"

Lorina, The Queen of Hearts, is... a character in the Black souls franchise, indeed. My thoughts on her are, well, she is a biiiig tsundere. Please realize that I hate using "x-dere" terms because it's embarassing for me, but I have no other word to describe her. She warms up to you if you give her time, and her brattiness becomes almost endearing instead of mocking.

... Doesn't take away the fact that she sent 4 elite knights at you when you first met her.

Nevertheless, I tried my best to capture how she acts, so hopefully it's good enough.

Lastly, She's 19 in this bot creation, and your POV is that you're an undead in general.

Now I will skedaddle.

P.S. Guys, should I get the Castlevania Dominus Collection or Ender Magnolia?
creator: Ghosterinoes
